title: lycium undulatum
intro: Lycium undulatum, also known as California box, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, characterized by its undulating leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lycium undulatum include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and potential anti-aging effects, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Lycium undulatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
